親愛的家長、同學及朋友：
從1987年我初執教鞭，到今時今日，已經30年了。這30年來，教學從我的興趣，成為我的職業，再從職業，成為我的人生使命。我是個幸運的人，因為我找到了讓我奉獻一生的事業，因為這份事業賜予我一班優秀的學生，因為這班學生將我的精神永遠延續。如果書山有路，我願成為點點燭光，為你們指引未來；如果學海無涯，我願化作一盞明燈，為你們燃亮前路。
從今日起，我將會在一個嶄新的平台──遵理學校，繼續我的使命。
很感謝遵理學校創辦人 June Leung 的誠意邀請，以及她對我教學原則的認同和尊重。在往後的日子，我仍會堅持以學生為本的教學理念，竭盡所能，提升同學對學習英語的興趣和能力。我深信在遵理，我不但能繼續實而不華的教學風格，精益求精，還可融入更多英語運用的創新元素，力臻完善，令我的學生更有效率地學習。
時光可變、世界可變，但我的教學之火將歷久不熄、直到永遠。衷心感謝各位家長、同學、家人和朋友多年來的支持，我堅信，在遵理學校，我將會像beacon一樣，發光發亮，為莘莘學子引路、護航──我會繼續一往無前、做到最好！謝謝！
Patrick Chan
----------------------------------------------
Dear Parents , Students & Friends,
It has already been 30 years since I started my career of teaching, during which teaching transformed from my interest into my work and further into my lifelong mission. I'm a lucky man not only because I have found an occupation to which I can devote my life, but also I'm blessed with a multitude of brilliant students who can pass my spirit on and on to future generations. I promise, that I will continue to be your light in the dark, guiding you towards a bright future.
I hereby officially announce that from today onwards, I will continue my career of teaching on a new platform -- Beacon College.
I'm much obliged to the founder of Beacon College , June Leung for her sincere invitation and respect for my teaching principles. In the future, I will persevere in improving students' abilities in English language. I believe in Beacon College, I can carry on with my pragmatic teaching style, keep on pursuing the better, incorporate more novel elements into my teaching materials, and push myself to a whole new level, allowing my students to learn more efficiently.
Time flies; things change, but on the contrary, my passion for teaching never wavers, till the end of my life. I sincerely thank you all, parents, students, family and friends for your unremitting support over the years. At Beacon College, I believe, like a chain of beacons, I will never cease to lead you on the right path to success -- I will keep moving forward and be the best I could be. Thank you all.
Patrick Chan
